title: Jocoro Desilijic Tiure
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Jocoro Desilijic Tiure |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]{{CSWECite|II|169|Jocoro the Hutt (Jocoro Desilijic Tiure)}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=[[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Jocoro Desilijic Tiure''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who became a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] by some [[Time/Legends|time]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' In the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] that followed the Battle of Endor, Jocoro ran a small criminal empire from a base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Du Hutta]].{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} After 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY's]] [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], where another Hutt crime lord, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], one of Jabba's [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]], the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] [[Umpass-stay/Legends|Umpass-stay]], went on to work for Jocoro on Du Hutta. ==Behind the scenes== Jocoro was introduced in [[1997]]'s ''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'', a supplement for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' The Hutt was first named as "Jocoro" in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, which was published on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' would later identify the Hutt by the full name of Jocoro Desilijic Tiure. ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' {{1stm}} *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stID|Jocoro}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Jocoro Desilijic Tiure}} ==Notes and references==
